title: T-004 — Drizzle migration: wo_waste_log table + RLS
prompt:
# T-004 — Drizzle migration: wo_waste_log + RLS

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §9.5, §16.4 V-PROD-05

## Goal
Add Drizzle migration creating wo_waste_log per §9.5 with FK to waste_categories (V-PROD-05), shift_id stamping (V-PROD-19), RLS, 3-year retention.

## Implementation contract
packages/db/schema/production/wo-waste-log.ts: PK id UUID, transaction_id UNIQUE (R14), tenant_id, wo_id REFERENCES work_orders, category_id REFERENCES waste_categories (V-PROD-05), qty_kg NUMERIC(12,3) CHECK >0, operator_id, shift_id text NOT NULL (V-PROD-19), reason_notes, approved_by, recorded_at default now. Indexes idx_waste_wo, idx_waste_category_time, idx_waste_tenant_time. RLS by tenant_id. Note 3-year retention in migration comment per §5.5.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/schema/production/wo-waste-log.ts [create]
- packages/db/schema/production/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_wo_waste_log.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/wo-waste-log-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given category_id pointing to non-existent waste_categories row, when INSERT runs, then FK violation raised (V-PROD-05)
2. Given shift_id NULL, when INSERT runs, then NOT NULL constraint rejects (V-PROD-19)
3. Given migration applied, when pg_indexes queried, then idx_waste_category_time and idx_waste_tenant_time both indexed on (col, recorded_at)

## Test strategy
- RED: schema test asserting category_id FK + shift_id NOT NULL before schema exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test wo-waste-log-schema'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow shift_id NULL (breaks V-PROD-19)
- Do not skip waste_categories FK (V-PROD-05)
- Do not allow qty_kg<=0

pipeline_inputs.description: wo_waste_log Drizzle table with waste_categories FK, shift_id NOT NULL, RLS.
pipeline_inputs.details: Mirror §9.5 SQL exactly. category_id REFERENCES waste_categories(id) (waste_categories defined in 02-SETTINGS — assume exists). shift_id text NOT NULL (V-PROD-19). qty_kg CHECK >0. Indexes: idx_waste_wo, idx_waste_category_time(category_id, recorded_at), idx_waste_tenant_time(tenant_id, recorded_at). RLS by tenant_id. 3-year retention noted as migration comment.
out_of_scope: Do not implement waste API endpoints
acceptance_criteria: Given non-existent category_id, when INSERT runs, then FK violation raised
Given shift_id NULL, when INSERT runs, then NOT NULL violation raised
Given migration applied, when pg_indexes queried, then idx_waste_category_time and idx_waste_tenant_time exist on (col, recorded_at)
test_strategy: RED: schema test asserting category_id FK and shift_id NOT NULL before schema exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test wo-waste-log-schema'
